faqs.question: How much does cockroach extermination cost in Secaucus?
faqs.answer: Cockroach extermination in Secaucus typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and type of treatment required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Why are cockroaches so common in Secaucus buildings?
faqs.answer: Secaucus's proximity to wetlands, dense residential development, and older building stock creates ideal conditions for cockroaches. German cockroaches thrive in apartment complexes and restaurants, while American cockroaches are common in areas near the Hackensack River and properties with moisture issues.
